name: The Mortgage Calculator
description_short: Licensed mortgage lender offering 20+ loan programs including conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, non-QM, DSCR, and hard money mortgages with instant online rate calculators and pre-approvals.
description_long:
The Mortgage Calculator is a licensed mortgage lender (NMLS #2377459) operating through an online platform designed to simplify mortgage shopping and pre-approval. Founded to modernize the mortgage process, the company positions itself around offering extensive program variety beyond traditional bank offerings, particularly in the non-QM and alternative documentation space. The company maintains real-time mortgage pricing tools and claims to provide instant online calculators across multiple loan types.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products spanning conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, non-QM, bank statement, DSCR investor, construction, renovation, bridge, fix-and-flip, hard money, reverse mortgages, HELOCs, foreign national mortgages, multi-family commercial real estate, and land loans. Their quote process takes 3-5 minutes and does not require an SSN to view initial rates. They provide both purchase and refinance options across single-family, multi-unit, investment, and commercial properties.

The company differentiates itself by emphasizing "thousands of mortgage program variations" and specializing in non-QM loans (alternative documentation mortgages for self-employed, gig workers, and borrowers with non-traditional income). Their live rate pricing as of the website snapshot shows competitive rates across multiple programs, with USDA at 5.375% and conventional at 5.990% for primary residence mortgages. The online-first application approach contrasts with traditional branch-based lenders.

Key limitations include that advertised rates are estimates based on specific assumptions (760 FICO, 60% LTV, 40% DTI, $500K purchase price) and actual rates will vary. The website content does not provide information about approval rates, customer service availability, loan processing timelines, closing costs, or customer reviews. No pricing information is disclosed for specialty programs like hard money or bridge loans. The company's ability to deliver on the promise of "thousands" of programs versus actual availability remains unverified from the website alone.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Licensed mortgage lender with NMLS #2377459 providing regulatory credibility
Extensive program diversity including 20+ loan types from conventional to hard money, bridge, and commercial mortgages
Specializes in non-QM and bank statement loans for self-employed and non-traditional income borrowers
Quick quote process (3-5 minutes) without requiring SSN for initial rate estimates
Offers both primary and investment property mortgages including DSCR, short-term rental, and multi-family programs
Live rate pricing displayed transparently with APR calculations included
Supports foreign national mortgages, construction loans, and renovation mortgages less commonly advertised by mass-market lenders
cons: Published rates are estimates based on very specific assumptions (760 FICO, 60% LTV) that likely don't match most borrowers' actual scenarios
Website provides no information about actual approval rates, average processing times, or closing costs
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible on the website to verify service quality
Unclear distinction between advertised program availability and what's actually available to applicants with different credit profiles or loan amounts
Second mortgage and commercial rates (7.625%-9.250%) are notably high compared to primary residence products, with limited explanation
best_for: Self-employed and gig workers seeking non-QM or bank statement loan options with flexible documentation
Real estate investors looking for DSCR, fix-and-flip, or bridge financing across multiple property types
Borrowers seeking pre-approval and rate quotes without extensive documentation or immediate SSN submission
Borrowers with foreign national status or non-traditional income seeking mortgages unavailable through traditional banks
diagnosis: The Mortgage Calculator is best suited for borrowers with non-traditional income (self-employed, gig workers), real estate investors, or those seeking niche mortgage products (foreign national, construction, DSCR) who value quick online pre-qualification. Primary caveat: advertised rates assume excellent credit (760 FICO) and favorable loan scenarios; actual approval rates, timelines, and costs are undisclosed, and applicants should verify whether their specific situation qualifies for advertised programs and rates.
services: DSCR investor mortgages with 3-year, 5-year, and no prepayment penalty options
Commercial and multi-family real estate mortgages
HELOC (home equity line of credit) loans
Online mortgage rate calculator and pre-approval tool
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
